name: local-tldraw-board
description: Persistent local tldraw boards with a Codex MCP bridge for visual iteration, screenshots, and design review.

interface.shortDescription: Use persistent local tldraw boards from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Local tldraw Board gives Codex a durable visual workspace: a localhost tldraw editor for human review, a local MCP bridge for tool-driven edits, board snapshots saved under the user profile, and helper scripts for setup, launch, health checks, and opening named boards.
defaultPrompt: Open a local tldraw board for this project.
Arrange these screenshots on a tldraw board.
Export the current local board as a PNG.
